Wbest-practices.github/workflows/ci.ymlci.yml: no explicit permissions block — defaults to read-write (overly permissive)explicit-permissions
Wbest-practices.github/workflows/firebase-hosting.ymlfirebase-hosting.yml: no explicit permissions block — defaults to read-write (overly permissive)explicit-permissions
Wbest-practicesNo linter config (ESLint/Biome/dart analyze) — code style not enforcedlinter-config
Wbest-practicesNo test script in package.json — testing not configuredtest-script
Wdependencies36 moderate vulnerabilities
Warchitectureweb/src/vite-env.d.tsOrphan: not imported by any file (dead module?)orphan-module
Warchitectureweb/src/App.tsxHigh fan-out: imports 24 modules — hard to test in isolationhigh-fan-out
Wconfusionweb/src/hooks/useChannels.tsGeneric variable: data — use a descriptive namegeneric-name
Wconfusionweb/src/hooks/useContactChannels.tsGeneric variable: result — use a descriptive namegeneric-name
Wconfusionweb/src/hooks/useNotifications.tsGeneric variable: body — use a descriptive namegeneric-name
Wconfusionweb/src/chat/db.tsAmbiguous abbreviation "db" in filename — could mean: database (connection? schema? query builder?)ambiguous-abbreviation
Wconfusionweb/src/vite-env.d.tsAmbiguous abbreviation "env" in filename — could mean: environment (runtime? deployment? variables?)ambiguous-abbreviation
Wcontextweb/src/App.tsx24 imports (>15) — consider splitting or co-locatingheavy-imports
Itype-safetyweb/src/screens/ChannelListScreen.tsxnon-null assertion (!.)unsafe-type
Ibest-practices.github/workflows/discord-notification.ymldiscord-notification.yml: CI install without frozen lockfile — builds may not be reproduciblefrozen-lockfile-ci
Ibest-practices.github/workflows/firebase-hosting.ymlfirebase-hosting.yml: 1 third-party actions not pinned to SHA — vulnerable to supply chain attackspin-actions-to-sha
Ibest-practicesNo engine constraints (engines in package.json or .nvmrc) — Node version not pinnedpin-node-version
Ibest-practicespackage.json missing repository field — provenance attestation won't link to sourcerepository-field
Ibest-practicesNo SECURITY.md — users don't know how to report vulnerabilitiessecurity-policy
Ibest-practicesNo CODEOWNERS file — no mandatory reviewers for critical pathscodeowners
Ibest-practicesNo CONTRIBUTING.md — onboarding is harder for new contributorscontributing-guide
Ibest-practicesNo pre-commit hooks (husky/lefthook) — lint/format not enforced before commitpre-commit-hooks
Ibest-practicesNo Dependabot/Renovate — dependency updates are manual and often forgottenautomated-deps
Ibest-practicesNo formatter config (Prettier/Biome/.editorconfig) — inconsistent code formattingformatter-config
Ibest-practicesNo test coverage configuration — coverage thresholds not enforcedcoverage-config
Ibest-practicesNo .dockerignore — node_modules and build artifacts will bloat Docker imagedockerignore
Ibest-practicesNo commit convention enforcement (commitlint/changesets) — changelog generation is manualconventional-commits
Isecurityweb/index.htmlNo Content-Security-Policy meta tag in HTMLCWE-1021
Iperformanceweb/src/hooks/useNotifications.tsLarge destructured import — if from a barrel, only imported items should be bundledlarge-import
Iperformanceweb/src/hooks/usePeerChannel.tsLarge destructured import — if from a barrel, only imported items should be bundledlarge-import
Iperformanceweb/src/screens/ChatScreen.tsxLarge destructured import — if from a barrel, only imported items should be bundledlarge-import
